name: Clift Hotel
description: A 6-minute walk from Union Square and 4 minutes from a Muni Metro station, this luxury hotel designed by Philippe Starck features an artsy furniture collection in the lobby, including work by Salvador Dali.

name: W San Francisco
description: Less than a block from the Yerba Buena Center for the Arts, this trendy hotel is a 12-minute walk from Union Square.

name: Hotel Zetta
description: A 3-minute walk from the Powell Street cable-car turnaround and BART rail station, this hip hotel 9 minutes from Union Square combines high-tech lodging with artsy touches.

name: Hotel Vitale
description: This waterfront hotel with Bay Bridge views is 3 blocks from the Financial District and a 4-minute walk from the Ferry Building.

name: Phoenix Hotel
description: Located in the Tenderloin neighborhood, a 10-minute walk from a BART rail station, this retro motor lodge has hosted many rock musicians and other celebrities since the 1950s. It is a 4-minute walk from the historic Great American Music Hall nightclub.

name: St. Regis San Francisco
description: St. Regis Museum Tower is a 42-story, 484 ft skyscraper in the South of Market district of San Francisco, California, adjacent to Yerba Buena Gardens, Moscone Center, PacBell Building and the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art.

name: Fairmont San Francisco
description: Historic luxury hotel on Nob Hill known for city and bay views, grand architecture, and classic San Francisco character.

name: Palace Hotel
description: Landmark downtown hotel near Market Street with a renowned atrium, refined rooms, and strong business-travel location.

name: The Westin St. Francis
description: Union Square icon with classic and modern towers, central shopping access, and cable car frontage.

name: InterContinental Mark Hopkins
description: Nob Hill high-rise with panoramic views and a classic rooftop lounge, set in one of SF's most historic districts.

name: Hyatt Regency San Francisco
description: Embarcadero waterfront hotel with a dramatic atrium and quick access to transit, the Ferry Building, and downtown offices.

name: InterContinental San Francisco
description: Contemporary SoMa hotel near Moscone Center with floor-to-ceiling skyline views and a modern business-ready setting.

name: Hotel Nikko San Francisco
description: Japanese-inspired upscale hotel close to Union Square, known for sleek interiors and polished service.

name: Omni San Francisco Hotel
description: Financial District hotel in a historic building, offering classic interiors and strong walkability to Chinatown and transit.

name: San Francisco Marriott Marquis
description: Large convention-oriented SoMa hotel near Yerba Buena and Moscone, with elevated city views and extensive amenities.

name: Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco
description: Premium Market Street hotel with refined interiors, upscale dining access, and proximity to Union Square and SoMa.
